title: hymenophyllum villosum
intro: Hymenophyllum villosum, also known as the hairy fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum villosum include its potential to treat various conditions such as arthritis, eczema, and skin irritations, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
